label: Not Interested
description: The Fellow appears disengaged, absent, or unwilling to put in visible effort on basic work.
key_signals: misses meetings or ignores assigned work
supervisor has very low confidence in reliability

label: Lacks Discipline
description: The Fellow works only when directly told and does not maintain basic discipline without close supervision.

label: Motivated but Directionless
description: The Fellow may show enthusiasm, but effort is unfocused and does not reliably convert into useful output.
key_signals: needs close direction to produce value

label: Careless and Inconsistent
description: The Fellow produces some output, but quality and consistency are unreliable.

label: Consistent Performer
description: The Fellow does what is asked and meets expected standards, but mostly within assigned scope.
key_signals: limited evidence of initiative beyond assigned work

label: Reliable and Productive
description: The Fellow is trusted with defined responsibilities and follows through well, but does not clearly identify new problems or build durable systems.

label: Problem Identifier
description: The Fellow notices patterns or problems independently and expands the scope beyond assigned tasks.
key_signals: surfaces problems the supervisor had not articulated

label: Problem Solver
description: The Fellow builds useful solutions, not just reports problems, and begins producing visible business improvements.
key_signals: creates trackers, SOPs, dashboards, or routines
connects root causes to measurable outcomes

label: Innovative and Experimental
description: The Fellow tests approaches, builds new tools, and gets others to adopt improved ways of working.
key_signals: teams adopt the Fellow's process changes

label: Exceptional Performer
description: The Fellow creates replicable systems that others learn from and that continue to shape the operating rhythm after the Fellow leaves.
key_signals: creates replicable systems others learn from
major business outcomes improve through durable operating changes
